summary: W1367 adds a checked named source-boundary quotient and closed-quotient W532 transfer wrapper guard for representative-image, top-target, and compact-target variants. The wrappers map named source boundaries to LCA source-difference fields and delegate to the W1366 quotient source-difference wrappers. The original four-task product goal remains open.
known_gaps: W519/W520 convergence and direct route surfaces remain to inspect.
Concrete providers and categorical closure structures remain to be consolidated into the final accepted path.
remaining_work: Continue reducing route surfaces toward the original four-task completion contract.
Preserve product_success=false until the immutable contract is satisfied by Lean and audit evidence.
Keep reference-route evidence aligned with docs/research/reference_route_log.md.
